title: platystachys kunthiana
intro: Platystachys kunthiana, also known as Himalayan mint or Indian mint, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae. The plant is traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine, and its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Platystachys kunthiana include relief from digestive issues, respiratory problems, and skin irritations, as well as its ability to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Herbal preparations of Platystachys kunthiana include teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be used to make topical creams, balms, and ointments for various health benefits.
